title: Revised Vanilla MC
description: A collection of all useful and beautiful Minecraft optimization mods, with plug and play mod config which is preset according to popularity.
body:
# Revised Vanilla MC
A collection of all useful and beautiful Minecraft optimization mods, with plug and play mod config which is preset according to popularity. It is not a performenc prioritizing packet but a shader performance intensive packet. No new blocks, creatures and etc will be added as **the focus is on vanilla xperience**.

![Forest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/49209bb4a741e4dd5e339f72497b1410dfb46622.png)
## Multiplayer Support
Thanks to [e4mc](https://modrinth.com/mod/e4mc), multiplayer can easily play with the whole world via internet via LAN server.
> **How do I use it?** : Simply install the modpack, and Open to LAN as normal. A public domain will appear alongside the local port. Others can simply connect to the public domain to connect to your LAN server.
## Included mods
- [3D Skin Layers](https://modrinth.com/mod/3dskinlayers) (-Render the player skin layer in 3d-)
- [Accurate Block Placement Reborn](https://modrinth.com/mod/accurate-block-placement-reborn) (-Makes block placement smarter. **Default toggle button: J** -)
- [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin) (-Food/hunger-related HUD-)
- [Better Third Person](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-third-person) (-Improves third person camera view.-)
- [Cherished Worlds](https://modrinth.com/mod/cherished-worlds) (-Favorite/pin/bookmark certain worlds-)
- [Clean F3](https://modrinth.com/mod/clean-f3) (-Removes useless information from the debug screen-)
- [Cubes Without Borders](https://modrinth.com/mod/cubes-without-borders) (-Minecraft in borderless fullscreen window-)
- [Detail Armor Bar](https://modrinth.com/mod/detail-armor-bar) (-More detail about armor in Armor bar-)
- [Dynamic Lights](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-lights) (-adds Dynamic Lights-)
- [Eating Animation](https://modrinth.com/mod/eating-animation) (-adds sprite animations for edible and drinkable items-)
- [Falling Leaves](https://modrinth.com/mod/fallingleaves) (-Adds a neat little particle effect to leaf blocks-)
- [First-person Model](https://modrinth.com/mod/first-person-model) (-Enables the third-person Model in first-person-)
- [Freecam (Modrinth Edition)](https://modrinth.com/mod/freecam) (-freecam mod. **Default toggle button: F4 and F6 for player input** -)
- [Gamma Utils (Fullbright)](https://modrinth.com/mod/gamma-utils) (-making it easy to see in the dark. **Default toggle button: G** -)
- [ImmersiveThunder](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersivethunder) (-adds realistic and dynamic thunder sounds-)
- [Legendary Tooltips](https://modrinth.com/mod/legendary-tooltips) (-fancier tooltip-)
- [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) (-shaders mod for Minecraft. **Default toggle button: I** -)
- [Lighty](https://modrinth.com/mod/lighty) (-Light Overlay Mod. **Default toggle button: F7** -)
- [Mace but 3D](https://modrinth.com/mod/mace-but-3d) (-Add a clean 3D model for Mace-)
- [Make Bubbles Pop](https://modrinth.com/mod/make_bubbles_pop) (-makes bubble particles pop and lets them rise realistically to the water surface-)
- [Model Gap Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modelfix) (-Fixes gaps in Block Models and Item Models-)
- [More Mobs](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-mobs) (-Humanoid mobs get custom player heads or unused vanilla mobs-)
- [Mouse Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/mouse-tweaks) (-inventory management by adding various functions to the mouse buttons-)
- [Not Enough Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-animations) (-Bringing first-person animations to the third-person-)
- [Presence Footsteps](https://modrinth.com/mod/presence-footsteps) (-Overly complicated Sound Mod-)
- [Show Me Your Skin!](https://modrinth.com/mod/show-me-your-skin) (-hide or customize armor rendering. **Default toggle button: Z** -)
- [Shulker Box Tooltip](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulkerboxtooltip) (-View the contents of shulker boxes-)
- [Soul Fire'd](https://modrinth.com/mod/soul-fire-d) (-Let Soul Fire burn-)
- [Sound Physics Remastered](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound-physics-remastered) (-provides realistic sound attenuation, reverberation, and absorption through blocks-)
- [Status Effect Bars](https://modrinth.com/mod/status-effect-bars) (-Adds bars to the status effects overlay-)
- [Toggle Item Frames](https://modrinth.com/mod/toggle-item-frames) (-To toggle item frame visibility, **sneak + right click with an empty hand**-)
- [Visuality](https://modrinth.com/mod/visuality) (-visual improvements by adding a bunch of new particles-)
- [Wakes](https://modrinth.com/mod/wakes) (-Adds splashes and wakes while traveling on water-)
- [Xaero's World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map) (-Adds a full screen world map-)
- [Zoomify](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify) (-A zoom mod-)
- [e4mc](https://modrinth.com/mod/e4mc) (-multiplayer support mod-)
- performance and mod libraries (-important and necessary support mods-)
- and much more
